message:
fix(codegen): Handle __new__ returning None and exception cause validation

- Add newReturnsNone() check to detect __new__ methods that return None
- Generate init() that raises TypeError when __new__ returns None
- Update raise.zig to instantiate user-defined exception classes as causes
- When init() fails (e.g., __new__ returns None), raise TypeError with message

This fixes the case where `raise X from SomeClass` should fail with
TypeError if `SomeClass.__new__` returns None instead of an exception
instance.
